note: Both are attributed to GRU units; MITRE notes Sandworm-related operations were conducted with assistance from GRU Unit 26165/APT28.
APT28 is GRU Unit 26165; Ember Bear/Cadet Blizzard is linked to GRU Unit 29155. Link is parent-service level, not the same unit.
Sandworm is GRU Unit 74455; Ember Bear/Cadet Blizzard is GRU Unit 29155. Link is parent-service level and both are associated with destructive/disruptive operations against Ukraine.
Both are publicly tied to Russia's FSB Center 18 / Centre 18. This is the strongest FSB pair in the dataset.
UK FSB factsheet groups Turla/Snake and Dragonfly/Energetic Bear under FSB Centre 16; CISA/DOJ attribute Snake/Turla operations to FSB Center 16.
Both are FSB-linked; ESET reports active collaboration where a Gamaredon tool was used to relaunch Turla's Kazuar backdoor on a Ukrainian machine.
Turla is associated with FSB Center 16 and Star Blizzard with FSB Center 18. Link is parent-service level, not the same center.
Dragonfly/Energetic Bear is listed under FSB Centre 16 and Star Blizzard under FSB Centre 18. Link is broad FSB parent-service level.
Dragonfly is listed under FSB Centre 16; Gamaredon/Aqua Blizzard is attributed by Ukraine to FSB Center 18 and described by Microsoft as a Russia-based nation-state actor.
